title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager at Anthropic, built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant that uses the Claude API to draft customer replies in a sales rep's own voice. The tool reduces administrative burden on sales teams by automating email composition.
